description:
JOB DESCRIPTION
Participate in the full software development life cycle, from requirements analysis to deployment and maintenance.
Develop, maintain, and enhance company websites with clean, optimized code.
Design, maintaining database (e.g., MySQL/PostgreSQL), integrating, develop, implement robust, scalable, and efficient to software and web applications.
Ensure website performance, responsiveness, and user experience across devices.
Build and implement front-end and back-end web applications.
Participate in front-end and back-end web development, ensuring high-quality code.
Participate in system deployment including user requirement scoping, design, coding, testing, implementation, and documentation.
Write clean, well-documented, maintainable code using best practices, efficient, and secure PHP code to handle server-side logic.
Perform testing, design, debugging, optimize existing systems, troubleshooting and upgrade existing systems to improve reliability, ensure the quality, reliability, and scalability technical solutions of our software based on business requirements.
Ensure timely and successful delivery of products and solutions.
Assists to provide technical advice and recommendations for software solutions and practices when necessitating.
Participate in code reviews and provide technical guidance when necessitating.
Collaborate with team members on system deployment and maintenance when necessitating.
Evaluate and adopt new technologies to improve team or company efficiency when necessitating.
Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies, tools, and industry trends to continuously improve our software solutions.
REQUIREMENTS
Candidate must possess at least a Professional Certificate, Diploma/Bachelor's Degree, or Diploma in Computer Science/Information Technology, Software Engineering or equivalent.
Minimum 1 year & above of software development experience.
Strong foundation in web development languages and computer languages such as but not all: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Python, Node.js, SQL, WordPress, Shopify & etc.
Understanding of frameworks: CodeIgniter, Express.js.
Required skills: PHP, ReactJS, NodeJS, JavaScript, MySQL, MongoDB, OOP.
Knowledge of  RESTful or GraphQL APIs to enable communication between different software systems would be an added advantage.
Proficiency and knowledge of React Native and Microsoft 365 applications is a plus.
Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to work independently or in a team.
With relevant work experience and ability to work independently.
